payment.payment_error_desc: Could not initiate payment. Please try again.

booking.no_event_or_order: No event or order data available.

booking.no_persons_yet: No persons added yet. Add a delegate or guest to begin.

submit.success: Your booking has been submitted successfully.
submit.failed: Submission failed — please fix the following errors:

submit.confirmation_message: Your booking has been submitted successfully. You can now proceed with payment.
submit.generic_error: Submission failed. Your data is preserved — please try again.

pdf.no_persons_yet: No persons have been added yet.
pdf.validation_valid: ✓ Order is valid at this moment
pdf.disclaimer: Generated on {{datetime}}. Products and availability subject to change.

delegate_manager.conflict_description: This order was modified by another delegate. Please reload to see the latest changes.

preparation_pdf.title: Preparation PDF
preparation_pdf.description: Download a preparation PDF for event logistics. Only submitted and locked orders are included.
preparation_pdf.no_orders: No submitted or locked orders available for PDF generation.

claims.title: Claims Management
claims.load_failed: Failed to load claims. Please try again.
claims.no_rows: No registry rows found for this event.
claims.release_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to release the claim for "{{label}}" ({{email}})? The associated order will be kept.
claims.already_claimed: This row is already claimed. Release the existing claim first.
claims.member_not_found: No member found with this email address.

lock_unlock.title: Order Lock / Unlock
lock_unlock.load_failed: Failed to load orders. Please try again.
lock_unlock.no_orders: No orders found for the selected filters.
lock_unlock.single_unlock_desc: Order unlocked and returned to draft.
lock_unlock.invalid_status: Only submitted or locked orders can be unlocked.
lock_unlock.cannot_lock_draft: Draft orders cannot be locked. Submit first.
lock_unlock.lock_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to lock {{count}} submitted order(s)? Delegates will no longer be able to edit their bookings.
lock_unlock.unlock_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to unlock {{count}} order(s)? This will return them to draft status and allow delegate editing.

reports.no_data: No data available for the selected filters.
